# midpoint

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/midpoint"
```

Package midpoint performs midpoint analysis and generates a 90\-degree Cosmobiology dial. A midpoint is the halfway point between two planet longitudes, revealing hidden connections in a chart.

CalcMidpoints returns a MidpointTree containing all midpoint pairs, aspects to midpoints, and a sorted 90\-degree dial for Ebertin\-style analysis.

- [type MidpointTree](<#MidpointTree>)

<a name="DialEntry"></a>
## type [DialEntry](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/midpoint/midpoint.go#L38-L42>)

DialEntry is a point on the 90\-degree Cosmobiology sort

```go
type DialEntry struct {
    ID       string  `json:"id"`
    Dial90   float64 `json:"dial_90"`
    Original float64 `json:"original_longitude"`
}
```

<a name="MidpointAspect"></a>
## type [MidpointAspect](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/midpoint/midpoint.go#L21-L28>)

MidpointAspect represents a planet on a midpoint axis

```go
type MidpointAspect struct {
    Planet      string    `json:"planet"`
    PlanetLon   float64   `json:"planet_longitude"`
    MidpointOf  [2]string `json:"midpoint_of"`
    MidpointLon float64   `json:"midpoint_longitude"`
    Orb         float64   `json:"orb"`
    HarmonicDiv int       `json:"harmonic_div"` // 1=conjunction/opp, 2=square, 4=semi-square/sesqui
}
```

<a name="MidpointEntry"></a>
## type [MidpointEntry](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/midpoint/midpoint.go#L12-L18>)

MidpointEntry represents a single midpoint between two bodies

```go
type MidpointEntry struct {
    BodyA     string  `json:"body_a"`
    BodyB     string  `json:"body_b"`
    Longitude float64 `json:"longitude"`
    Sign      string  `json:"sign"`
    SignDeg   float64 `json:"sign_degree"`
}
```

<a name="MidpointTree"></a>
## type [MidpointTree](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/midpoint/midpoint.go#L31-L35>)

MidpointTree holds all midpoints and planet\-on\-midpoint activations

```go
type MidpointTree struct {
    Midpoints    []MidpointEntry  `json:"midpoints"`
    Activations  []MidpointAspect `json:"activations"`
    SortedDial90 []DialEntry      `json:"sorted_dial_90"`
}
```

<a name="CalcMidpoints"></a>
### func [CalcMidpoints](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/midpoint/midpoint.go#L45>)

```go
func CalcMidpoints(positions []models.PlanetPosition, orb float64) *MidpointTree
```

CalcMidpoints computes all midpoints and finds activations
